notes: Locked query for Greg. Executive-level tech/product roles. Broad capture with exclusion of junior + Field CTO. Excludes agencies. Avoids very small companies.

params.advanced_title_filter: ( 'Chief Technology Officer' | 'Chief Technical Officer' | 'Chief Information Officer' | 'Chief Product Officer' | 'Chief Information and Technology Officer' | CTO | CIO | CPO | ('Senior Vice President' <-> (Technology | Engineering | Product)) | ('Executive Vice President' <-> (Technology | Engineering | Product)) | (SVP <-> (Technology | Engineering | Product)) | (EVP <-> (Technology | Engineering | Product)) | ('Vice President' <-> (Technology | Engineering)) | (VP <-> (Technology | Engineering)) | 'Head of Technology' | 'Head of Engineering' ) & ! (assistant | associate | intern | internship | junior | 'Field CTO' | 'Field Chief Technology Officer')
